response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with 15+ years of experience, but the profile does not match this role's mandatory requirements. Hands-on C++ experience is limited to a short stint at National Instruments (~7 months in 2014–2015) and a thesis project, far short of the required 5–10 years on Windows. There is no SQL Server or Oracle depth, and no fixed-income or capital-markets domain experience — RIDE Capital was investment-adjacent product work, not trading or banking systems. The core stack (TypeScript/Node.js, DLang) does not transfer to this engagement.
strengths: 15+ years of professional software development across web, desktop, and embedded systems
Proven low-latency systems experience (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and community teaching
concerns: Minimal professional C++ experience (~7 months), with no evidence of Windows-platform C++ work
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain exposure

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering seniority and fundamentals
